title: Delivery Receipt
description: Attestation written by `build_team --update` after a successful (non-dry-run) emission. Records the team identity (manifest fingerprint + algo version + project name + framework + output_dir) AT THE MOMENT a build-log was written. Used by operators / orchestrators to verify 'this on-disk team corresponds to a delivery I made' without re-running the full pipeline. Receipt is intentionally NOT a baseline: it does not feed into output_files_map, template_hashes, or file_hashes, and an absent or out-of-date receipt does not change drift detection. See `docs_src/delivery-procedure.md`.

artifact_type.description: Discriminator. ALWAYS the literal string 'delivery-receipt'. Distinct from `schema_version` so a receipt cannot be confused with a build-log when read by tools that key on the latter.

receipt_schema_version.description: Receipt schema version. Bumped only when the receipt contract changes in a backwards-incompatible way.

delivered_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the receipt was written (i.e. when --update completed successfully).

project_name.description: Project name from the manifest at delivery time.

framework.description: Framework identifier the team was generated for (e.g. 'copilot-vscode', 'copilot-cli', 'claude').

manifest_fingerprint.description: Stable fingerprint of the team manifest at delivery time. Identical to the build-log's `manifest_fingerprint` field after this --update run. A consumer can verify 'build-log unchanged since delivery' by comparing the two.

fingerprint_algo_version.description: Value of `agentteams.drift.FINGERPRINT_ALGO_VERSION` at delivery time. Consumers comparing fingerprints across versions must compare algo versions first; mismatched algo versions mean the fingerprints are not comparable.

output_dir.description: Absolute or repo-relative path of the output directory at delivery time. Informational only — moving the directory does not invalidate the receipt.

agentteams_version.description: Version of the agentteams package that wrote the receipt. Informational; used by operators to bound regression hunts.

delivered_by.description: Optional free-form identifier of the operator or CI job that ran --update (e.g. 'gh-actions:release-v2.3'). Receipt write does not require this field.
